description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image with a before_script of `npm install` and caches the `node_modules/` directory. Define three stages: test, build, and deploy. In the test stage add a `lint` job that runs `npm run lint`. In the build stage add a `dist` job that runs `npm run build`, stores the `dist/` folder as an artifact, and is limited to pipelines triggered by tags. In the deploy stage add a `publish` job that depends on the `dist` artifact, runs only on tags, writes an `.npmrc` containing the `${NPM_TOKEN}` secret via `echo '//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${NPM_TOKEN}' > .npmrc`, copies `src/proxy.js` to the project root with `cp src/proxy.js .`, and executes `npm publish` to publish the package to the npm registry.
